# PregnancySprout

> PregnancySprout is a pregnancy and parenting information website based in the United States, serving readers worldwide. Content is written and reviewed by certified midwives, registered nurses, and experienced parenting writers. All health content is aligned with NHS, WHO, and American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP) clinical guidelines. The site does not provide personal medical advice.

## Primary Topics
- [Pregnancy Week by Week](https://pregnancysprout.com/pregnancy/week-by-week): Guides for each of the 40 weeks of pregnancy
- [Baby Names](https://pregnancysprout.com/baby-names): 1,188+ names with meanings, origins, and popularity data
- [Product Reviews](https://pregnancysprout.com/products): Honest, unbiased reviews of baby and parenting products organised by category (strollers, car seats, monitors, and more)
- [Best-Of Roundups](https://pregnancysprout.com/products/roundups): Buying guides comparing top products in each category with FAQs
- [Parenting Tips](https://pregnancysprout.com/parenting): Newborn care, sleep training, feeding, and child development
- [Blog](https://pregnancysprout.com/blog): Expert pregnancy and parenting articles

## Free Tools
- [Due Date Calculator](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/due-date-calculator): Calculates estimated due date from last menstrual period
- [Ovulation Calculator](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/ovulation-calculator): Identifies fertile window from cycle data
- [Contraction Timer](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/contraction-timer): Times labour contractions with gap and duration tracking
- [Baby Name Generator](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/baby-name-generator): Generates name suggestions by gender, origin, and style
- [Registry Checklist](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/registry-checklist): Persistent checklist of recommended newborn essentials
- [Symptom Checker](https://pregnancysprout.com/tools/symptom-checker): Maps pregnancy symptoms to informational guidance

## Editorial Standards
- [Editorial Standards](https://pregnancysprout.com/editorial-standards): All health claims are supported by peer-reviewed research or clinical guidelines (NHS, WHO, AAP, CDC). Content is reviewed for accuracy at least annually. Product reviews do not accept payment for editorial placement.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://pregnancysprout.com/affiliate-disclosure): Affiliate links are disclosed per FTC guidelines
- [Corrections](https://pregnancysprout.com/corrections): Published corrections log

## Optional
- [About](https://pregnancysprout.com/about): About the PregnancySprout editorial team
- [Contact](https://pregnancysprout.com/contact): Contact PregnancySprout — hello@pregnancysprout.com
- [Sitemap](https://pregnancysprout.com/sitemap.xml): Full XML sitemap of all indexed pages
